suggestions: I'm grateful for the quiet peace before Fajr to clear my mind before the busy day starts.
I'm thankful for that satisfying feeling when a complex bug is finally resolved and the build passes.
I'm grateful for the simple joy of a warm plate of nasi lemak and a hot teh tarik on a rainy morning.
I'm thankful for the rezeki of a stable job that allows me to support myself and help my family.
I'm grateful for a smooth production deployment today with zero downtime.
I'm thankful for the clean, empty roads on my morning commute when I manage to beat the peak traffic.
I'm grateful for a well-maintained surau at the office that lets me take a peaceful break to pray and reset.
I'm thankful for senior developers and teammates who are patient and willing to share their knowledge.
I'm grateful for the refreshing cool air that follows a heavy afternoon thunderstorm.
I'm thankful for a relaxed Friday evening mamak session with my friends to wind down after a long sprint.
I'm grateful for git commit history saving me when I accidentally broke my local environment.
I'm thankful for my parents' prayers and blessings that keep me grounded and motivated.
I'm grateful for the flexibility of working from home, which gives me extra time to rest and focus.
I'm thankful for a quick, wholesome lunch with my team that makes the workday feel much lighter.
I'm grateful for the patience and clarity of mind to handle high-pressure tasks without losing my peace.
